claim: CLI subcommand surface (init|sim|list|refresh|spaces|log|history|tokens|cost|gc|doctor|version) is locked under semver; new subcommands additive minor versions only
rationale: Subcommand enum (Cmd) exhaustively lists all 12 subcommands; clap-derive dispatch in main() binds all arms; dark-factory regression test validates UX end-to-end with no breaking changes

claim: reposix init URL shape reposix::<scheme>://<host>/<backend>/projects/<project> is locked under semver; only backend additions are additive
rationale: init.rs asserts the canonical form in translate_spec_to_url; ADR-008 ratified this shape; dark-factory tests validate no URL regressions via agent UX

claim: Exit codes are locked under semver: reposix CLI exits 0/1; git-remote-reposix exits 0/1/2 per spec; new exit codes additive minor versions only
rationale: exit-codes.md documents stable contract with detailed exit-code tables per subcommand; main.rs uses anyhow Result->exit(0|1) pattern; git-remote-reposix main() has explicit 3-tier dispatch matching the spec

claim: git-remote-reposix protocol surface: capabilities (stateless-connect, export, refspec refs/heads/*:refs/reposix/*) are locked under semver; new capabilities additive minor versions only
rationale: main.rs lines 118-129 emit the locked capabilities and refspec; real_main() routes all verbs; stateless_connect.rs implements the handler; test coverage via dark-factory agent UX which validates git protocol end-to-end

claim: Server-controlled frontmatter fields (id, created_at, updated_at, version) cannot be overridden by client writes; client values are stripped on export path and replaced with ServerMetadata
rationale: taint.rs defines ServerMetadata struct with the four locked fields; sanitize() function destructures tainted Record, discards client id/created_at/updated_at/version fields with _, and rebuilds using ServerMetadata values; used in export path at main.rs:510,537

claim: BackendConnector trait is locked under non_exhaustive discipline: new methods via BackendFeature extension pattern; adding required method is breaking change
rationale: backend.rs line 52 declares BackendFeature enum with #[non_exhaustive]; trait impl pattern documented; BackendCapabilities struct is separate and additive; all concrete backends use feature flags to branch on capability
